benefits.description: Increased feeling of calm well being

side_effects.description: Severe lethargy at doses above 3 IU (constant naps)

protocol_notes: Has used 1-8 IU daily; sweet spot is 2-3 IU. Notes HGH reduces thyroid function, recommends T3 or T4 co-administration. Runs HGH on and off for life. Also uses Test with HGH; mentions trying turinabol or anavar once yearly. Has history of anabolic use including trenbolone. Currently on protocol with exotic plant medicines, HMG, HCG, and microdose protocols. Searching for cerebrolysin. Prefers HGH over peptides because peptides increase appetite. Notes horizontal running veins acquired after starting HGH.
